feed.text: Antman, Red, Misty, and Bill entered the S.S. Anne ticket office instead of skipping ahead by WorldLink.
Bill checked the S.S. Anne manifest and found late passenger edits tied to Rocket shell accounts.
Bill decoded a second Nexus network pulse hidden inside the ship manifest timestamps.
Red guarded the harbor doors while Misty watched the waterline for Rocket movement.
Antman earned an S.S. Anne boarding pass. The ship chapter can begin from Vermilion harbor.
